objective: Optimize CleanMac scrolling performance and remove the main sources of visible jank.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when scrolling-related SwiftUI hotspots have been inspected, the highest-impact jank source is fixed without weakening product behavior, focused source/test coverage or existing tests validate the change, the app builds/tests successfully, ./script/build_and_run.sh --verify confirms the app launches, .loopgoal/state.json records the final state, and the intended changes are committed.

phases.name: Initialize checkpoint and establish current repo state

current.focus: GOAL complete. Performance fixes landed: CleanMacPage now uses LazyVStack, static CleanMacPulseIcon and CleanMacFeatureImage instances no longer host TimelineView(.animation), CleanMacFeatureImage loads bundle PNGs through a main-actor cache, page background sparkles are static instead of repeatForever, and duplicate hashing after app scans/cleanup runs in a detached helper instead of the main actor. Verification: the new scrolling guard failed before implementation and passed after; the new duplicate-hashing guard failed before implementation and passed after; env CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/cleanmac-clang-cache swift test passed with 104 XCTest tests and 12 Swift Testing tests; git diff --check passed; ./script/build_and_run.sh --verify exited 0; ps aux showed dist/CleanMac.app/Contents/MacOS/CleanMac running as PID 1170.
current.next_action: Stop scheduling after committing the verified implementation.

decisions.reason: The user requested a result-driven performance optimization, not a recurring time-based loop.

decisions.decision: Keep the exit condition tied to build/test plus launch verification rather than subjective smoothness alone.
decisions.reason: The report is broad and local performance instrumentation may be limited, so the checkpoint needs a concrete completion gate while still targeting the visible scrolling jank.

decisions.decision: Prioritize the reusable illustration and page-layout path before deeper data-model refactors.
decisions.reason: Both independent read-only investigations and main-agent review found CleanMacFeatureImage and CleanMacPulseIcon are used throughout scrolling surfaces while always hosting TimelineView(.animation), and CleanMacFeatureImage reloads bundle PNGs from body-time code.

decisions.decision: Keep subagents read-only for this goal.
decisions.reason: The user-provided AGENTS.md instructions forbid subagents from editing files, so the main agent owns checkpoint writes, implementation, validation, and commits.

decisions.decision: Make inactive illustrations static rather than removing the active animation behavior entirely.
decisions.reason: The jank source was always-on timeline work while scrolling; keeping TimelineView only for active scanning/review states preserves the design language with a much smaller redraw footprint.
They are decorative and always present behind scroll views, so removing their repeatForever animation reduces continuous work without changing app behavior.

decisions.decision: Move duplicate hashing into a nonisolated detached helper instead of a broader store refactor.
decisions.reason: This removes known main-actor file hashing after app scans and cleanup while keeping the existing ObservableObject surface stable.
